hero.title: How to Apply for a Mortgage Loan
hero.subtitle: From first click to funded account — our 4-step process is designed to be fast, digital, and doorstep-friendly.

items.title: Share Your Details
items.desc: Fill our digital form with KYC, property information and bank statements. No branch visit required — takes under 15 minutes.

items.title: AI Evaluation
items.desc: Our underwriting model evaluates 200+ data points — property value, bank flow, GST filings — and issues a sanction letter, often same day.

items.title: Property Verification
items.desc: Submit your title deed and property documents. Our field team handles legal and technical valuation within 24–48 hours.

items.title: Get Your Loan
items.desc: Sign digitally via Aadhaar e-sign. Funds are credited directly to your bank account. Own. Unlock. Grow.

sections.title: Keep these ready before you start

sections.footnote: Takes 2 minutes · No credit score impact · 100% confidential
